_note: The upstream codec YAML ships no examples, so vectors are synthetic. Inputs are hand-built real-time frames (function_code 0x41, data_type 0x01) with all decoded values held inside vocabulary bounds. expected derived from upstream TTN decoder: the upstream decoder (reference/upstream-codec.js) is run with its only transcription bug fixed (its `Decoder` body reads an undefined `data` identifier instead of the `bytes` argument; run as-is it throws ReferenceError), then the resulting fields are normalized per codec.js. Unlike the T&H sibling, this variant has a real NDIR CO2 sensor, so air.co2 carries genuine non-zero readings.

uplink.description: Nominal real-time frame: T=23.5C, RH=52.3%, CO2=420ppm, battery=85%
Negative temperature with elevated CO2: T=-10.0C, RH=10.0%, CO2=800ppm, battery=100% (exercises sub-baseline temp math)
High CO2 + high humidity edge: T=30.0C, RH=99.9%, CO2=5000ppm, battery=20% (exercises 12-bit humidity nibble math and big-endian CO2)
Unsupported frame (function_code 0x42, not real-time) returns an error
Truncated real-time frame (header only) returns an error
